'''Euton''' was a terrestrial [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Dathomir system/Legends|Dathomir system]],<ref name="TEA" /> a part of the [[Quelii sector/Legends|Quelii sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in the [[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]] portion of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. It occupied the second [[Orbit/Legends|orbital]] position around the [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Domir/Legends|Domir]], and it featured a searing [[Temperature/Legends|hot]] environment and a rocky surface. Euton had no [[Moon/Legends|moons]].<ref name="TEA" />

==Behind the scenes==
Euton was first mentioned in ''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]'', a [[2004]] sourcebook for the ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]'', published by [[Wizards of the Coast]].<ref name="GatORW">''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]''</ref> The [[2009]] book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed Euton in grid square O-6.<ref name="TEA" />
